attacking_style: Launches decisive moves 200m-5km from finish, typically from protected wheel position. Excels at late-race accelerations on technical finishes, gravel sectors, and short punchy climbs rather than long-range efforts.
team_tactics: Dual-role rider: performs high-tempo domestique work on climbs early/mid-race, then released for stage hunting in breakaways or final selections. Team protects positioning until late attack phases.
terrain_preference: Technical finishes with positioning advantages (gravel sectors, narrow roads, steep 200m ramps). Strong in short TTs and prologues. Vulnerable on sustained GC climbs above 2km at high intensity.
vulnerability: Cracks immediately when elite climbers raise tempo inside final 2km of major climbs. Positioning errors in technical sections lead to crashes. Poor sprint timing when opening too early (>200m).
key_patterns: Wins from breakaways or late selections, rarely from bunch sprints (4 wins analyzed)
Performs early-race tempo domestique work then gets dropped on GC climbs (5 instances)
Excels in prologues/short TTs showing specialist fast-twitch power (3 strong results)
Technical/positioning mastery on gravel, roundabouts, narrow finishes creates winning advantages (4 observations)
Attacks from wheels 200m-1km out rather than long-range moves (6 wins/attacks)
Vulnerable to crashes in technical sections despite positioning skill (3 crash incidents)
form_trajectory: positive: 2023 Tour breakaway win at Grand Colombier after 137km shows resurgent stage-hunting capacity at age 33, reversing 2020-2021 domestique-only trajectory
